2. The concerned controlling authorities are informed about the transfer of the above-mentioned engineers.
The engineers should be relieved immediately to join the site and new appointments should be made.
Arrive at the location immediately. Also, the date on which the concerned engineers are relieved
made and the date on which they appeared at the place of the new appointment to the Government.
Notify immediately at the doser3.pwd@maharashtra.gov.in e-mail address. Nevertheless, the above
Special In-Depth Review Programme of Service Electoral Rolls of Engineers -
If acquired for 2026, such engineers will be placed in positions of appointment.
In order to be, the duty must not be discharged until it is done. as well as the Election Commission.
Care should be taken to ensure that the instructions are not disregarded in any way.
3. Since the transfer is on the request of the above engineers, they are entitled to travel allowance and tenure of appointment.
It will not be allowed.
4 Leave granted to concerned engineers without prior permission of the Government for any reason
Don't do it. Also, as per Rule-30 (c) of the M.N.S. (Leave) Rules, 1981, the original office
No leave applications of transferred employees shall be entertained. Such an application has been received
If so, they must return the payment by post to the relevant employee by registering at the original address. The origin
In the event of sending leave applications of transferred employees to the office, these applications will be taken into consideration.
It won't come.
